candidates.label: Soft Containment + Return-Flow Port
candidates.description: Start from the best B1 scaffold and explicitly reintroduce return-flow coupling as the circulation-state carrier.

candidates.label: Soft Containment + Omega Port
candidates.description: Start from the best B1 scaffold and explicitly reintroduce the drying-to-omega bridge as the circulation-state carrier.

candidates.label: Open Circulation Bundle
candidates.description: Use the narrowed scaffold without containment and port the full circulation bundle: return-flow coupling, omega bridge, and weak-hemi taper.

decision.nextMove: Architecture B2 failed the bounded quick screen across every explicit circulation-state port. Move to Architecture B3: direct rollback circulation splice.
